Formerly: WMST386 and WMST368.

Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 449

WGSS369 Special Topics in Study Abroad III (1-6 Credits) Special topics course taken as part of an approved study abroad program.

Repeatable to: 15 credits if content differs.

Formerly: WMST369.

WGSS370 Black Feminist Thought (3 Credits)

Examines the ideas, words and actions of Black women writers, speakers, artists, and activists in the United States.
